title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that learns representations of genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. It reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on molecular design tasks and enables applications in drug toxicity prediction, antibody generation, and cancer drug discovery.
